title: Login Screen - Verify all UI elements are present and correctly displayed
description: Checks for the presence, text, and default state of all UI components on the Login screen.
preconditions: App is launched for the first time or user is logged out.

steps.description: 3. Verify the STAGE App Logo is displayed at the top center.
4. Verify the welcome message 'राम राम जी' is displayed.
5. Verify a hero image is present.
6. Verify the title 'अपना फ़ोन नंबर डालें' is displayed.
7. Verify the subtitle 'इस नंबर पर 4 अंकों का STAGE कोड भेजा जाएगा।' is displayed.
8. Verify the Country Code Selector is present and defaults to '+91'.
9. Verify the Phone Number Input Field has the placeholder 'मोबाइल नंबर'.
10. Verify the 'लॉगिन करें' button is visible and green.
11. Verify the divider 'या कनेक्ट करें' is present.
12. Verify the Google Sign-In button with the Google icon is present.
13. Verify the 'Add Custom URL' button is present.
14. Verify links for 'Terms & Conditions', 'Privacy Policy', and 'Refund Policy' are present.

expected_result: All specified UI elements are displayed correctly on the Login screen as per the PRD.
